channel.title: Honch Status
channel.description: Incident history and status updates for Honch services

item.title: Honch Ingest is down
item.description: [Resolved] In [`f813ae5`](https://github.com/honch-io/upptime/commit/f813ae543d14d4b84b4e801fb9613163077c9bcd ), Honch Ingest (https://is.honch.io) was **down**: - HTTP code: 502 - Response time: 40 ms
